TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Amis Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://ami.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Korismas O kasofocan ni Yis ko Korismas, i saka 25 a romi'ad no saka 12 a folad to mihecahecaan. O pihifangan ko Korismas i kasakanatal, o tadamaanay a romi'ad i saetipay a kanatal. Caay kaedeng ca i kiwkay, o kaacangan to no 'alomanay ko Korismas imatini. Parecad a maacang ko 'alomanay to Korismas ato faelohay a mihecaan, pinapina to a lipay ko kaacangan a romi'ad. I Korismas a micacakay to maamaan ko tamdamdaw, o sapafeli to idang, ano eca i o sapakapah to loma'.
S.PHON: ko~urismas o~u kaso~ufo~u ¶an ni jis ko~u ko~urismas, i saka ** a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ no~u saka ** a fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ to~u mińß…ô ¶ańß…ô ¶aan. o~u pińßifaŇčan ko~u ko~urismas i kasakanata…ĺ, o~u ta…¨~…ģamaanaj a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ i sa…ôtipaj a kanata…ĺ. ¶aaj ka…ô…¨~…ģ…ôŇč ¶a i kiwkaj, o~u kaa ¶aŇčan to~u no~u °a…ĺo~umanaj ko~u ko~urismas imatini. par…ô ¶a…¨~…ģ a maa ¶aŇč ko~u °a…ĺo~umanaj to~u ko~urismas ato~u fa…ô…ĺo~uńßaj a mińß…ô ¶aan, pinapina to~u a …ĺipaj ko~u kaa ¶aŇčan a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ. i ko~urismas a mi ¶a ¶akaj to~u maamaan ko~u tam…¨~…ģam…¨~…ģaw, o~u sapaf…ô…ĺi to~u i…¨~…ģaŇč, ano~u …ô ¶a i o~u sapakapańß to~u …ĺo~uma °.
S.FORM: Korismas O kasofocan ni Yis ko Korismas, i saka 25 a romi'ad no saka 12 a folad to mihecahecaan. O pihifangan ko Korismas i kasakanatal, o tadamaanay a romi'ad i saetipay a kanatal. Caay kaedeng ca i kiwkay, o kaacangan to no 'alomanay ko Korismas imatini. Parecad a maacang ko 'alomanay to Korismas ato faelohay a mihecaan, pinapina to a lipay ko kaacangan a romi'ad. I Korismas a micacakay to maamaan ko tamdamdaw, o sapafeli to idang, ano eca i o sapakapah to loma'.
